1.content:

At least there were guys at the school, but we're not focusing on guys.

You live with your older sister-in-law, Risa. She is, what you can describe as, a drill sergeant from Hell. She always waked you up early so you could get ready for school. Probably because she works at your school as either a health and physical education teacher, as well as the school nurse. That doesn't mean you both hated each other. You both had a good relationship as a family. Again, hard to talk to her since she has those huge melons!

Anyhow, you were walking through the park, thinking about who and how you were going to ask a girl out without getting nervous about their breasts. Suddenly, you heard a small kitten meowing. You looked around to find a black kitten stuck on one of the tree's branches. How it got up there was a mystery, but you did know you had save it. You approached the tree and slowly climbed up, making sure you didn't startle the cat. Slowly and carefully, you picked up the kitten and carried it to the ground.

The kitten looked oddly bizarre. It had black fur and light green eyes. On its forehead was a weird looking yellow Wi-Fi symbol. It was wearing a red collar around its neck with a golden bell and a red ribbon around its tail.

"You are the cutest thing I ever saw!" You said. In all seriousness, the kitten was adorable.

"Why thank you human!" The kitten replied, sounding like a child.

"WHAT THE-?!" You yelled out as you tripped and landed on your back. The kitten then began shinning brightly and then faded away, revealing what you believe is her human form. She looked like she was around 8 or 10. Her hair and eyes were the same and the tail stayed, but there were some obvious changes. Her red ribbon was on her head now. She was wearing a black halter neck dress with a cape that was red on the inside. A small ribbon was tied on her collar with two bells. One of them had that weird Wi-Fi symbol on it.

"First time seeing a spirit huh?" The girl spoke. "My name is Shami."

"(Y/N)." You replied, standing back up.

"Thank you again for rescuing me from that tree." Shami said. "As a token of my appreciation, I will grant you any of your fantasies!"

"What's the catch?" You asked. "Usually there's always something bad when it comes to wishes."

"Well, you do lose a bit of your height." Shami answered.

"How much?" You asked again.

"Until you're 2 inches." Shami replied. Anything you want for the cost of your size. This could be your only chance you could actually ask someone out, but who could it be? There were so many girls at your school that it was difficult to choose only one. There was only one way to decide...and it seemed a bit greedy.

"So....I guess I want my very own harem...." You said, embarrassed from you said. Your left wrist suddenly became a bit heavy. You looked down to discover a chrome watch, possibly a Samsung.

"When that beeps, it means that there's an event playing." Shami explained. Suddenly, there was noticeable difference in your surroundings. Everything around you seemed bigger........EVEN SHAMI! She really wasn't kidding about the whole shrinking thing! You could even see under her dress and it looked like she wasn't wearing any panties! You couldn't even utter out a word. All you could do was stare up at her and blush.

You then heard something beeping coming from your new watch. You looked at the watch, which not only told the current time, but something was written on it. "Spiritual Snack". Your eyes widen as you figured what that meant for you. You slowly looked back at Shima who now had a hungry look on her face.

"I guess I could use a little snack." Shami said as she licked her lips. Your legs were completely frozen as her ginormous hand descended upon you and picked you up by your shirt collar. Shami then opened her mouth and slowly brought you closer. Her warm breath wrapped around you like a sauna. Her large tongue welcomed you inside and pulled you into her awaiting maw. Her mouth closed and began tossing you around, sampling your flavor. You could barley see anything. Her huge tongue kept smacking you around, your whole body was covered in saliva, and you could hear Shami moaning with delight as she continued to savor you. It soon stopped as her tongue brought you closer to the back of her throat. You didn't know what to feel at this point.

Whether it was fear or curiosity. With one push from her tongue, you were sent down her throat, towards her stomach. Her esophagus squeezed and pulled you further in. You could hear her heart beating as you pass by slowly. Eventually, you were dropped into her stomach. All you could see was red flesh around you. A drop of what you think was stomach acid landed on your arm, but didn't even hurt. That was a relief. Though, it would take time getting used to being so small.

"I'll let you out in a few minutes. Till then, I'm taking a nap." Shami's muffled voice said. Your surroundings then shifted to its side, causing you to fall over. Luckily, the stomach was pretty soft like a water bed. You decided to get some sleep too and allowed the sound of her heart and stomach rock you to sleep.

*A few minutes...*

You woke up to see something familiar. Your ceiling!

"It was just a dream." You said to yourself. "That felt too real." As you sat upright, your eyes widen again from what you saw. YOU"RE STILL SMALL! That means this harem thing could still be on! You noticed that your sister-in-law was sitting next to your bed. Purple hair and matching eyes, white lab coat over a white sweater, black skirt and lightbrown stockings, obviously pissed. Yep, it was Risa. You thought she was big before, but now she was massive!

"Care to explain why my step brother is the size of a paper clip?" Risa asked in a bold tone.

"Good morning to you to." You replied sarcastically. "If I told you, you wouldn't believe me."

"Believe what? That you magically teleported back home and shrunk down just to peek under me?" She replied. Now it felt like those stereotypes to where the main character does it on accident.

Risa let out a sigh and then said, "Forget it,__________________________________________

Risa let out a sigh and then said, "Forget it, "I've already called Matsuri to give you a lift to school." Matsuri was one of your friends from school. Come to think of it, a lot of your friends are girls. Any way, she had always given you a ride on her bike any time you were running late. Weird thing was that she calls you "Senpai" for some reason. Knowing that it arguing with her could be pointless so you'd let her keep calling you that name.

You then realized the encounter you had earlier. Somehow your uniform was actually dry, even though you'd been swallowed by Shami. It was like it never happened, but you remember every detail!

Suddenly, there was a knock at the door. It must've been Matsuri. If it was, then that was surprisingly quick! But this is a work of fiction so I don't have to explain ANYTHING! Risa then picked you up by your shirt collar and walked you over to the front door. The door swung open, revealing Matsuri who was waiting to pick you up. She had short light blue hair with a small heart-shaped hair pin, rainbow glossed sunglasses and light blue eyes. She was wearing a pink and white striped open track suit that showed more than just her midriff. At least she was wearing a black bra, but it doesn't help the fact that that her tits were massive! "So, where do you plan to put me?" You asked. "I'm basically pocket-sized."

The bad news was you were on her giant nipple! Like seriously, it was big enough to swallow you whole! All you could see was her white skin and the pink areola around her nipple. You then felt the world around you shaking as if there an earthquake. You then realized it was obviously Matsuri getting onto her bike. The world also shifted slightly as you held onto the massive nipple.

"Mmm!" Matsuri moaned. "Senpai! C-Careful where you grab on!" How could you be careful?! It was the only thing you could hold on to while she was riding her bike. Something didn't seem right though. Matsuri was never like this at all, up until she saw you at your new size. Could this be because of your wish for a harem?

You were starting to get curious to see if it was true. You wiggled yourself while clinging onto her massive nipple. Facing a now erect nipple, your perverted instincts came over you and you began pleasuring her with your tongue.

"Ahh! Senpai!" Matsuri moaned louder this time. Surprisingly, she was able to keep her balance out of this. You continued pleasuring her nipple as you heard the sound of Matsuri's erotic moaning. There could be a few advantages to your new size, but you need to play it safe from now on.

"So...we're here." Matsuri said, catching her breath.

What happens now?

A: Matsuri pulls you, gives you a kiss, and carries you to the school entrance.

B: Matsuri is still horny and pushes you into her nipple

C: Matsuri is still horney and puts you inside her vagina

D: Reader's choice

E: Reader's choice 2: Electric Boogaloo!
11.title: Your Personal Boober Driver

info.brief_description: After rescuing a spirit, she gives you a power to form your harem while you're 2 inches!
info.description:
Original Plot: A healthy and simple teenager, Majime Masato is a guy who is constantly thinking about girls and his fantasies. Despite his hormones guiding his thoughts, he is a decent person underneath (unless the player chooses the more amoral events where he takes advantage of less willing girls outside his schoolmates).

One day he sees a small black cat being harassed by children. Masato takes action and saves the cat—the critter thanks him with words. It turns out the cat is a magical being and offers her gratitude by bestowing Masato with a smartphone capable of fulfilling his fantasies, a gift he accepts with joy.

Masato is the head of an unofficial school club, the Black Pantyhose Lovers Club, where he dragged some of his classmates to be part of it. He is infamous around school for being a super pervert but Masato still follows the line of SQUEEZ's protagonists where they are already well acquainted with much of the female cast from the get go; they all get along with him to varying degrees, even those who claim he is a good for nothing pervert.


This however, will be different. This time...YOU are the main character and this time you've been shrunk within the this erotic Japanese visual novel. Instead of being a perv, you're just a guy who's looking to find love from the various girls with massive breasts. This interactive is based of a hentai visual novel called: Honoo no Haramase Oppai ★ Ero Appli Gakuen which has also gotten its own OVA.

Main Characters: (Last name, First name since it takes place somewhere in Japan.)

Hatsunegaoka Yui: http://squeez-soft.jp/soft/h_eapp/prof_img/yui_cha01.png

Uesaka Ayane: http://squeez-soft.jp/soft/h_eapp/prof_img/ayane_cha01.png

Belka Valentina: http://squeez-soft.jp/soft/h_eapp/prof_img/veruka_cha01.png

Sayama Misaki: http://squeez-soft.jp/soft/h_eapp/prof_img/misaki_cha01.png

Shiramine Sumika: http://squeez-soft.jp/soft/h_eapp/prof_img/sumika_cha01.png

Nikozaki Riko: http://squeez-soft.jp/soft/h_eapp/prof_img/riko_cha01.png

Kimizuka Tsubasa: http://squeez-soft.jp/soft/h_eapp/prof_img/tsubasa_cha01.png

Tsujibayashi Shouko: http://squeez-soft.jp/soft/h_eapp/prof_img/syouko_cha01.png

Shimano Matsuri: http://squeez-soft.jp/soft/h_eapp/prof_img/matsuri_cha01.png

Kisaragi Kyouko: http://squeez-soft.jp/soft/h_eapp/prof_img/kyouko_cha01.png

Majime Risa: http://squeez-soft.jp/soft/h_eapp/prof_img/risa_cha01.png

Himenogi Natsuki: http://squeez-soft.jp/soft/h_eapp/prof_img/natsuki_cha01.png


Rules:

1: 300 words minimum. A bit of inspiration from another interactive: https://www.writing.com/main/interactive-story/item_id/2141885-Shrunk-Near-Your-...

2: For the main protagonist's name; you can put: (Y/N) or Anon since it's supposed to be you!

3: Everything except for futa is allowed. You want to get eaten by Risa? Go for it! Breast vore? Sure! Feet? I'm not into it, but you may add onto it! Explore a child's body? Weirdly perverted and specific, but hey! You do you! But no traps. Also Tsubasa is a reverse trap: A guy who really is a girl. I think that's self explanatory

4: Try not to hijack a story.

5: No choice chapters. No one likes a chapter that is 10 words long. Let me see some creativity!

6: Keep the character's personality as they are. You can shift it a bit, but it needs to stay the same.

7: Don't kill the main character. Sucks when the chapter is getting more interesting and immediately ends.

If you're unsure with how many words you written in your chapter, use this: https://wordcounter.net/

If your chapter isn't at the minimum, I will inform you before deleting it and give it back to you so you can add more to it. If you have any questions, feel free to ask me and I'll see if I can answer them.

-Thank You!
info.pretty_title: Erotic Shrink App: Visual Novel Parody
